section_miscategorizations.text: The ultrasound will be ordered to evaluate the right inguinal lymph node.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a future diagnostic order/plan, not an already-performed procedure or observed finding, so it belongs in the Plan section.

section_miscategorizations.text: A suspicious inguinal lymph node was identified, warranting further investigation with ultrasound.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The identification of a suspicious lymph node is an objective exam finding; only the interpretive phrase about further investigation overlaps with assessment. Overall it fits better under Objective.
